title: hopea utilis
intro: Hopea utilis, also known as the white meranti or yellow meranti, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its timber and medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The extracts of Hopea utilis have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, offering health benefits like reducing inflammation and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hopea utilis can be consumed as teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
